<!-- indicator: fig-rccha-demo -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-rccha-demo
#| fig-cap: 'Rockland County Community Health Assessment Demographics'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Rockland County Community Health Assessment Demographics.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-rccha-demo", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
